THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSS, DEREK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY ST. UNIT 211, S.F. $870.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $870.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-05-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. IF DEFT VACATE PLTF TO RETURN $450- SECURITY DEPOSIT TO DEFT. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE APPLIED TOWARD BACK RENT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. NO FURTHER STAYS. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND DEEMED ABANDONED.
